name: gate-public-env-missing
description: The contract references `useMapboxMap` under `@acme/mapbox`, and the app registers that exact `(package, export)` pair — registry membership passes — but the registered descriptor's `requires` lists the public env key `GGUI_PUBLIC_APP_MAPBOX_TOKEN` and `App.publicEnv` carries no keys at all. The render-time env gate (SPEC §7.7.3 — `assertPublicEnvSatisfied`) MUST reject with code `gadget_public_env_missing`: without the key, the wrapper's `getPublicEnv()` would throw at hook-mount inside the iframe, so the gate surfaces the misconfiguration as a recoverable author/operator-time error instead. Recovery: stamp the key on the app's public env, or drop the wrapper binding from the contract.
